hero.sub: Seasonal dishes built from ingredients we source ourselves, plated with care and brought to your table in a room that feels like home.

highlights.title: Quick delivery
highlights.text: Hot to your door in 30 min

popular.title: Most-loved dishes
popular.sub: The plates our regulars keep coming back for, each one made to order.

items.name: Prawn Risotto
items.text: Creamy arborio folded with sweet prawns.

story.title: A kitchen built on honest cooking
story.body: What began as a small corner counter has grown into a table many now call their own. We still cook the way we started — patiently, with real ingredients and no shortcuts.
points: Menus that follow the seasons, not trends
Every sauce and stock made in-house
A dining room that welcomes everyone

specialties.title: House specialties
specialties.sub: Three things we pour our whole heart into, every single service.

items.name: Wood-fired grill
items.text: Meats and vegetables kissed by open flame for a smoky, honest char.

items.name: Stone-baked pizza
items.text: Slow-proved dough, blistered in a searing oven and finished simply.

items.name: Handmade desserts
items.text: Classic sweets made fresh daily, from tiramisu to warm fruit tarts.

gallery.title: Moments from our tables
gallery.sub: A glimpse of the plates, the people and the room that make an evening with us.

booking.title: Save your table tonight
booking.sub: Pick a date and time, tell us how many are joining, and we'll have your table ready.
booking.note: No deposit needed — free cancellation up to two hours before.

reviews.title: What our diners say
reviews.sub: Kind words from the people who share our tables night after night.

items.name: Amara Osei
items.quote: Every course felt considered. Warm service, and the risotto was the best I've had in years.

items.name: Daniel Cho
items.quote: We booked for an anniversary and left already planning the next visit. Effortless from start to finish.

items.name: Priya Nair
items.quote: You can taste the freshness in everything. The wood-fired grill alone is worth the trip.

cta.title: Hungry yet? Let's set your table.
cta.sub: Whether it's a quiet dinner for two or a long table for the whole crew, we'd love to cook for you.

footer.about: Where honest ingredients meet unhurried cooking. A neighbourhood kitchen crafting plates worth lingering over.
footer.tagline: Crafted with care, served with joy.
